MaxLineLength:KakaoDB.kt$KakaoDB$"WITH info AS (SELECT ? AS user_id) " + "SELECT COALESCE(open_chat_member.nickname, friends.name) AS name, " + "COALESCE(open_chat_member.enc, friends.enc) AS enc " + "FROM info " + "LEFT JOIN db2.open_chat_member ON open_chat_member.user_id = info.user_id " + "LEFT JOIN db2.friends ON friends.id = info.user_id;"
MaxLineLength:ObserverHelper.kt$ObserverHelper$"SELECT _id, chat_id, user_id, message, attachment, type, v, created_at FROM chat_logs WHERE _id > ? ORDER BY _id ASC LIMIT 100"
